equipmentMods.amulet: Increased 10% chance to spawn a container when killing an elite.
equipmentMods.belt: Blood Dragons: The dragons jump towards the player, and deal bonus damage the closer they are to their target up to +25%.
equipmentMods.bracer: Drinking a potion will not heal you, Gain 15% Elemental damage per potion slot instead
equipmentMods.goblet: Arcane Orb: Orbs become Chaos orbs, dealing 10% increased damage. Chaos orbs have a 10% chance to cause an Arcane burst when returning to the player.
equipmentMods.horn: Arcane Orbs: Fire an additional orb.
equipmentMods.relic: Gain 20 maximum Health for each available potion
equipmentMods.trinket: Arcane Orbs: Fire an additional orb.

equipmentMods.belt: Spark: Each spark propagates an additional time.
equipmentMods.goblet: Spark: Each spark propagates an additional time.
equipmentMods.horn: Spark: When Sparks collide, they have a 33% chance to spawn a plasma sphere that deals 25% damage . After 2 seconds it explodes for 25% damage. Plasma sphere may consume sparks to gain +25% damage bonus.
equipmentMods.trinket: Spark: The spark havve 50% chance to split into an additional spark.

equipmentMods.amulet: When killing an elite enemy, gain 10% chance to spawn another elite. (This mod stacks up to 4 times)
equipmentMods.belt: Electric Dragons: Gain an additional Electric Dragon, increasing its damage radius by 60%.
equipmentMods.bracer: Gain 1% Critical Chance for every Energy regeneration point.
equipmentMods.goblet: Electric Dragons: Each dragon has a 30% chance to shoot a burst of electric meteors that deal 15% damage.
equipmentMods.helmet: Killing a monster or hitting an elite/boss has a 10% to trigger a Bloodlust effect, gain 5% crit damage, 2% armor and 0.35% movement speed per stack. Stacks up to 100, lasts 15 seconds.
equipmentMods.horn: Electric Dragons: Each dragon has a 30% chance to shoot a burst of electric meteors that deal 15% damage.
equipmentMods.relic: Gain 100 Armor for each available potion
equipmentMods.trinket: Electric Dragons: Each dragon has a 30% chance to shoot a burst of electric meteors that deal 15% damage.

equipmentMods.belt: Blood Dragons: The dragons grow 25% larger and affect a wider area.
equipmentMods.bracer: Gain base Damage equal to 1% of your maximum Health
equipmentMods.goblet: Arcane Orbs: Fire an additional orb.
equipmentMods.horn: Arcane Orbs: Fire an additional orb.
equipmentMods.trinket: Arcane Orb: Orbs become Chaos orbs, dealing 10% increased damage. Chaos orbs have a 10% chance to cause an Arcane burst when returning to the player.

equipmentMods.amulet: Increased 10% chance to spawn a container when killing an elite.
equipmentMods.belt: Toxicity: Trigger a chain reaction, each projectile spawned receives additional 5% damage for each active pool on the battlefield.
equipmentMods.bracer: After completing all dailies, gain 300,000 gold.
equipmentMods.goblet: Arcane Apocalypse: Arcane Apocalypse gains a 15% chance to explode a second time, and a 5% to explode a third time.
equipmentMods.horn: Arcane Apocalypse: Arcane Apocalypse gains a 15% chance to explode a second time, and a 5% to explode a third time.
equipmentMods.relic: When you activate your Maul Divine Shield, there's a chance that all other fellowship members also gain a Divine Shield.
equipmentMods.trinket: Arcane Apocalypse: After an explosion, spawns a black hole that damages enemies over time. The black hole deals 5% damage per tick. Each stack decreases tick time by 5%, resulting in more damage over time.

equipmentMods.belt: Kraken Seed: Running over a Kraken Seed will shoot projectiles that explode on impact, dealing 20% damage.
equipmentMods.bracer: Gain 1% Elemental Damage for every 40 of your highest stat.
equipmentMods.goblet: Arcane Orbs: Fire an additional orb.
equipmentMods.horn: Arcane Orbs: Fire an additional orb.
equipmentMods.trinket: Arcane Orb: Orbs become Chaos orbs, dealing 10% increased damage. Chaos orbs have a 10% chance to cause an Arcane burst when returning to the player.

equipmentMods.belt: Chain Lightning: Chain lightning will link two additional times.
equipmentMods.goblet: Arcane Orbs: Fire an additional orb.
equipmentMods.helmet: Secondary Ability now charges three times as fast.
equipmentMods.horn: Arcane Orbs: Fire an additional orb.
equipmentMods.trinket: Arcane Orbs: Fire an additional orb.

equipmentMods.amulet: Gain 2% Physical Damage per Bloodlust stack
equipmentMods.belt: Arcane Orb: Orbs become Chaos orbs, dealing 10% increased damage. Chaos orbs have a 10% chance to cause an Arcane burst when returning to the player.
equipmentMods.goblet: Arcane Orbs: Fire an additional orb.
equipmentMods.horn: Arcane Orbs: Fire an additional orb.
equipmentMods.trinket: Arcane Orb: When Arcane orbs return to the player, it creates an Arcane burst, dealing 25% damage and a bonus +5% for every additional orb.

equipmentMods.amulet: Increased 10% chance to spawn a container when killing an elite.
equipmentMods.belt: Spinning Blade: Shoots a shuriken from each blade, dealing 5% damage. For each shuriken, the spinning blades get 5% additional damage.
equipmentMods.goblet: Arcane Orbs: Fire an additional orb.
equipmentMods.helmet: Landing a critical strike has a chance to provide a stack of Excitement, providing 3% all Elemental Damage. At 6 stacks, become the Juggernaut - gaining +25% size, +40% movement speed, +25% critical chance and double your critical damage bonus.
equipmentMods.horn: Arcane Orb: When Arcane orbs return to the player, it creates an Arcane burst, dealing 25% damage and a bonus +5% for every additional orb.
equipmentMods.relic: Gain an 8% chance to spawn Mecha Golems, dealing Fire Damage infront of them for 6 seconds. Mecha Golems benefit from your Fire Damage bonus
equipmentMods.trinket: Arcane Orbs: Fire an additional orb.

equipmentMods.belt: Spinning Blade: Spawns another blade on the battlefield, dealing 5% of the main blade damage.
equipmentMods.goblet: Static Charge: Static charge will strike an additional time, damaging more enemies and dealing an addition 1% per enemy inside Static Charge range.
equipmentMods.horn: Static Charge: Gain charges by damaging foes. Each charge adds 1% lightning damage. At 100 charges, summon thunderbolts across the battlefield.
equipmentMods.trinket: Static Charge: Static charge will strike an additional time, damaging more enemies and dealing an addition 1% per enemy inside Static Charge range.

equipmentMods.belt: Burning Shield: Surrounds your shields with Fire Swords, increasing the damage by 10% and radius by 33%.
equipmentMods.goblet: Eye of the Storm: Eye of the Storm will strike an additional time, and increasing Eye of the Storm damage by 10% per 57% growth in size.
equipmentMods.horn: Eye of the Storm: Eye of the Storm grows larger by 57%.
equipmentMods.trinket: Eye of the Storm: Eye of the Storm grows larger by 57%.

equipmentMods.belt: Carnage of Fire: Now spawns on enemies. When the fire hits the ground, spawn a flaming spike that gains a 25% damage bonus.
equipmentMods.goblet: Dragon Flame: The dragon stays for additional 1 seconds on the battlefield.
equipmentMods.horn: Dragon Flame: Increase radius of fire breath area by 40%, and 10% chance to deal an additional 40% damage.
equipmentMods.trinket: Dragon Flame: Increase radius of fire breath area by 40%, and 10% chance to deal an additional 40% damage.

equipmentMods.amulet: Gain 2% Physical Damage per Bloodlust stack

equipmentMods.trinket: Toxicity: Trigger a chain reaction, each projectile spawned receives additional 5% damage for each active pool on the battlefield.

equipmentMods.belt: Starblades: Gain an additional blade that deals 25% damage.

equipmentMods.horn: Kraken Seed: Running over a Kraken Seed will shoot projectiles that explode on impact, dealing 20% damage.
equipmentMods.trinket: Starblades: Starblades have a 15% chance of striking twice.

equipmentMods.belt: Arcane Apocalypse: Increase explosion size by 30%. When an explosion hits, 10% chance to gain 2% Arcane damage buff, stacks up to 75.

equipmentMods.trinket: Arcane Apocalypse: Arcane Apocalypse gains a 15% chance to explode a second time, and a 5% to explode a third time.

equipmentMods.trinket: Delusion of Zelkors: Mages are no longer illusions and remain on the battlefield for an additional 0.5 seconds.
